revision.comment: Auto-generated page using script written by Immanuelle, either as a placeholder redirect or to make bots recognize the page as made by Immanuelle
revision.text: [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]]

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: '鹿児島県[[阿久根市]]に関するカテゴリ。 [[Category:鹿児島県の市町村|あくねし]]'

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"

Bot: import en-wiki content & complete inter-wikis (Tier-sync)
revision.text:
==English Content== {{Portal|Japan}} This category comprises articles pertaining to the city of [[Akune, Kagoshima]], [[Japan]].
{{Commons category|Akune, Kagoshima}} {{Cat main|Akune, Kagoshima}}
[[Category:Cities in Kagoshima Prefecture]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with enwiki]] [[Category:Wikipedia categories named after populated places in Japan]] [[commons:Category:Category:Akune, Kagoshima]] [[en:Category:Akune, Kagoshima]] [[en:Category:Category:Akune, Kagoshima]] [[ja:Category:Category:阿久根市]] [[jawikiso:Category:カテゴリ:阿久根市]] [[ko:Category:분류:아쿠네시]] [[pt:Category:Categoria:Akune]] [[tg:Category:Гурӯҳ:Акуне]] [[zh:Category:Category:阿久根市]]
==Local Content== [[Category:Cities in Kagoshima Prefecture]] [[Category:Tier 2 Categories with enwiki]] [[Category:Wikipedia categories named after populated places in Japan]]
